Title: User can input energy consumption data
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the energy consumption section of the application.
2. Enter the sample energy consumption data.
3. Click the 'Save' button.
Expected Result: The entered energy consumption data is saved and displayed in the application.

Title: Accessing Home Screen
Preconditions: The application is installed on the user's smartphone.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application on the smartphone.
2. Tap the home button if the user is on any other screen.
Expected Result: The home screen of the application is displayed.

Title: Accessing Settings Screen
Preconditions: The user is on the home screen of the application.
Test Steps: 1. Tap the settings button on the home screen.
Expected Result: The settings screen is displayed.

Title: Modifying Application Settings
Preconditions: The user is on the settings screen.
Test Steps:
1. Tap the impostations button on the settings screen.
2. Modify the settings as desired.
Expected Result: The modified settings take effect immediately after the change is made.

Title: Changing Units of Measurement for Energy Consumption
Preconditions: The user is on the settings screen.
Test Steps:
1. Tap the settings button on the home screen.
2. Tap the impostations button on the settings screen.
3. Tap the unit of measurement for energy consumption.
4. Select the desired unit of measurement.
Expected Result: The unit of measurement for energy consumption is changed.

Title: Estimating Carbon Emissions for Energy Consumption
Preconditions: The user is on the home screen.
Test Data: Consumption of electricity, country of reference.
Test Steps:
1. Tap the estimate electricity button on the home screen.
2. Enter the consumption of electricity.
3. Enter the country of reference.
Expected Result: The estimated carbon emissions for energy consumption are displayed.

Title: Estimating Carbon Emissions for Air Travel
Preconditions: The user is on the home screen.
Test Data: Airport of origin, airport of destination, number of passengers, class of cabin.
Test Steps:
1. Tap the estimate air travel button on the home screen.
2. Enter the airport of origin.
3. Enter the airport of destination.
4. Enter the number of passengers.
5. Enter the class of cabin.
Expected Result: The estimated carbon emissions for air travel are displayed.

Title: Estimating Carbon Emissions for Delivery of Goods
Preconditions: The user is on the home screen.
Test Steps:
1. Tap the estimate delivery button on the home screen.
2. Enter the weight.
3. Enter the distance.
4. Enter the mode of transport.
Expected Result: The estimated carbon emissions for delivery of goods are displayed.

Title: Estimating Carbon Emissions for Vehicle Travel
Preconditions: The user is on the home screen.
Test Steps:
1. Tap the estimate vehicle button on the home screen.
2. Enter the distance.
3. Enter the vehicle brand.
4. Enter the vehicle model.
Expected Result: The estimated carbon emissions for vehicle travel are displayed.

Title: Estimating Carbon Emissions for Fuel Combustion
Preconditions: The user is on the home screen.
Test Data: Type of fuel, quantity of fuel.
Test Steps:
1. Tap the estimate fuel button on the home screen.
2. Enter the type of fuel.
3. Enter the quantity of fuel.
Expected Result: The estimated carbon emissions for fuel combustion are displayed.

Title: Change Application Settings
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the settings page
2. Select the desired setting to change
3. Input the new value for the setting
4. Save the changes
Expected Result: The setting is updated with the new value

Title: Change Units of Measure
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the settings page
2. Select the "Modifica delle unità di misura" option
3. Change the units of measure for each field
4. Save the changes
Expected Result: The units of measure are updated for each field

Title: App Information Screen
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the app information screen
2. Verify that all the app's features are listed
Expected Result: All the app's features are correctly listed

Title: Estimate Carbon Emissions for a Trip
Preconditions: User is logged in, trip details are entered
Test Data: Start location, end location, vehicle type, distance, and travel time
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the carbon emissions estimation page
2. Input the start location, end location, vehicle type, distance, and travel time
3. Calculate the carbon emissions
Expected Result: The carbon emissions for the trip are correctly calculated

Title: Estimate Carbon Emissions for a Flight
Preconditions: User is logged in, flight details are entered
Test Data: Departure airport, arrival airport, flight distance, and flight duration
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the carbon emissions estimation page
2. Input the departure airport, arrival airport, flight distance, and flight duration
3. Calculate the carbon emissions
Expected Result: The carbon emissions for the flight are correctly calculated

Title: Estimate Carbon Emissions for a Delivery
Preconditions: User is logged in, delivery details are entered
Test Data: Delivery origin, delivery destination, delivery distance, and delivery weight
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the carbon emissions estimation page
2. Input the delivery origin, delivery destination, delivery distance, and delivery weight
3. Calculate the carbon emissions
Expected Result: The carbon emissions for the delivery are correctly calculated

Title: Estimate Carbon Emissions for Fuel Combustion
Preconditions: User is logged in, fuel type is selected
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the carbon emissions estimation page
2. Select the fuel type
3. Calculate the carbon emissions
Expected Result: The carbon emissions for the selected fuel type are correctly calculated

Title: Uninstall Application
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the uninstall page
2. Initiate the uninstall process
3. Verify that the application is correctly uninstalled and the storage space is deallocated
Expected Result: The application is correctly uninstalled and the storage space is deallocated

Title: Verify Flutter Framework Usage
Preconditions: User has opened the application.
Test Steps: 1. Check if the application is built using the Flutter framework.
Expected Result: The application is built using the Flutter framework.

Title: Verify Minimum Use of Native Features
Preconditions: User has opened the application.
Test Steps: 1. Check if the application uses the minimum necessary native features of the device.
Expected Result: The application uses the minimum necessary native features of the device.

Title: Verify Quick Performance
Preconditions: User has opened the application.
Test Steps: 1. Measure the time taken for local operations (excluding network-dependent operations) within the application.
Expected Result: All local operations are completed in less than one second.

Title: Verify Low Storage Usage
Preconditions: User has opened the application.
Test Steps: 1. Measure the storage usage of the application.
Expected Result: The application occupies less than 50MB of storage on the hosting device.

Title: Verify Easy Navigation
Preconditions: User has opened the application.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate through the application and check if the navigation is simple and intuitive.
Expected Result: The application is easy to navigate.

Title: Verify Use of Standard Icons and Layout
Preconditions: User has opened the application.
Test Steps: 1. Check if the application uses standard icons provided by Flutter and a layout consistent with material design.
Expected Result: The application uses standard icons provided by Flutter and a layout consistent with material design.

Title: Verify Clean Code Practices
Preconditions: User has opened the application.
Test Steps: 1. Analyze the codebase for clean code practices.
Expected Result: The codebase follows clean code practices.

Title: Verify Punctual Delivery of Deliverables
Preconditions: N/A
Test Steps: 1. Check if deliverables are delivered on time.
Expected Result: Deliverables are delivered on time.

Title: Verify Use of External API for Carbon Emissions Estimates
Preconditions: User has an internet connection and the application is running.
Test Steps: 1. Check if the application uses the "carboninterface" API for carbon emissions estimates.
Expected Result: The application uses the "carboninterface" API for carbon emissions estimates.

Title: Verify Internet Connection Requirement
Preconditions: User has an internet connection and the application is running.
Test Steps: 1. Check if the application requires an internet connection to function.
Expected Result: The application requires an internet connection to function.

Title: Stimating carbon emissions for electricity consumption
Preconditions: User has selected the functionality "stimulate carbon emissions for electricity consumption" from the dashboard of the estimates screen.
Test Steps:
1. User selects the functionality "stimulate carbon emissions for electricity consumption" from the dashboard of the estimates screen.
2. User enters the correct electricity consumption value.
3. User clicks on the calculate button.
Expected Result: The estimated carbon emissions for the entered electricity consumption value are displayed on the screen.
